nasb.text: Micaiah declared to them all the words that he had heard when Baruch read from the book to the people.

esv.text: And Micaiah told them all the words that he had heard, when Baruch read the scroll in the hearing of the people.

cnv.text: 米該亞就把所聽見的一切都告訴他們，就是巴錄向眾人宣讀那書的時候，他所聽見的。

ccb.text: 米该亚将巴录向众人宣读的话都告诉了他们。
